mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, status, is_top, view_count, comment_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, status, is_top, view_count, comment_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverUrl}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND create_by = #{currentUserId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from article where category_id = #{categoryId} and is_deleted = 0
